li.label: guided by Aethira
li.description: Aethira Dawnforge spoke with me today. Her words steadied my soul.

li.label: blessed by Aethira
li.description: Aethira Dawnforge laid her hand upon me and whispered ancient words. I feel stronger, calmer, more certain of my place in the world.

li.label: Day of Remembrance
li.description: Today we remember all that Aethira has done for our people. Her protection is eternal, her love boundless.

li.label: witnessed divine ascension
li.description: I saw Aethira's body dissolve into a shockwave of divine light as she ascended beyond the mortal plane. The memory fills me with awe.
